sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Topa in kei hong cing tuucing lianpa hi,
Ka nunsung bangmah ka kisam kei ding hi,
Lono namun tuikiangah kei hongkha hi,
Ka nuntak na tha hongdim sak tontung hi.
Hoihna leh hehpihna in ka khan sung,
a tawntung in hongzui tak tak dinga,
Anuam a taang Topa innpha sungah,
Amah tawh ka om den ding.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Sihna lim guamsung nangawn kanawk hang in,
Hong cing a hih ma'n siatna kalau kei hi,
Amolh tum leh aciangkhut in kei aa hi,
A tawntung in kalungmuan na a hihi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Ka galte omna mai ah kei aa dingin,
Sabuai phah in an hong lui in hong vak hi
Keima lu zong sathau hong nilh sak den a,
Ama kiangah bang kangen lai khong ding hiam!
